mapper.sql: c.class_id, c.class_code, c.name, c.work_location, c.address, c.station, c.telephone, c.section_name, c.folder_name, c.tags, c.is_active, c.max_hours, c.min_hours, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.created_at, c.updated_at, b.break_id, b.class_id AS break_class_id, b.break_start_time, b.break_end_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_schedule_classes c LEFT JOIN work_schedule_class_breaks b ON c.class_id = b.class_id ORDER BY c.name ASC
SELECT FROM work_schedule_classes c LEFT JOIN work_schedule_class_breaks b ON c.class_id = b.class_id WHERE c.class_id = #{classId}
SELECT FROM work_schedule_classes c LEFT JOIN work_schedule_class_breaks b ON c.class_id = b.class_id WHERE c.name = #{name}
SELECT FROM work_schedule_classes c LEFT JOIN work_schedule_class_breaks b ON c.class_id = b.class_id WHERE c.class_code = #{classCode}
SELECT FROM work_schedule_classes c LEFT JOIN work_schedule_class_breaks b ON c.class_id = b.class_id WHERE c.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY c.name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_schedule_classes (class_code, name, work_location, address, station, telephone, section_name, folder_name, tags, is_active, max_hours, min_hours, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{classCode}, #{name}, #{workLocation}, #{address}, #{station}, #{telephone}, #{sectionName}, #{folderName}, #{tags}, #{isActive}, #{maxHours}, #{minHours}, #{startTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{endTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_schedule_classes SET class_code = #{classCode}, name = #{name}, work_location = #{workLocation}, address = #{address}, station = #{station}, telephone = #{telephone}, section_name = #{sectionName}, folder_name = #{folderName}, tags = #{tags}, is_active = #{isActive}, max_hours = #{maxHours}, min_hours = #{minHours}, start_time = #{startTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, end_time = #{endTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE class_id = #{classId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_schedule_classes WHERE name = #{name})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_schedule_classes WHERE class_code = #{classCode})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO work_schedule_class_breaks (class_id, break_start_time, break_end_time) VALUES
(#{b.classId}, #{b.breakStartTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler}, #{b.breakEndTime, typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LocalTimeTypeHandler})
